title: Workstations
description: Manage remote workstation connections (SSH, Docker) for agents to execute commands.
emptyDescription: Add a workstation to allow agents to run commands on remote machines.

agents.title: Agents
agents.empty: No agents linked. Link an agent to allow it to use this workstation by default.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.empty: No command patterns configured. Default patterns (git, ls, cat...) are seeded automatically.
permissions.hint: Patterns match the binary name (argv[0]). Use 'python*' for prefix-glob. The lone wildcard '*' is always rejected.

createDialog.title: Add Workstation
createDialog.description: Configure a new remote workstation connection.
createDialog.keyHint: Lowercase letters, digits, hyphens. Used by agents to reference this workstation.
createDialog.privateKeyHint: Paste the PEM contents of your private key
createDialog.authHint: At least one required: Private Key or Password

deleteDialog.title: Delete Workstation
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

testResult.notImplemented: Connection test is not yet available

activity.title: Recent Activity
activity.emptyDescription: Exec events will appear here once agents run commands.
